name: Japanese Fruit Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Butter or margarine, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs in a mixing bowl until frothy.
2. Add sugar and melted butter to the beaten eggs. Mix well.
3. Stir in coconut, raisins, pecans or walnuts, vanilla, and vinegar.
4. Pour the mixture into a pre-baked 9-inch pie shell.
5. Bake in a 350°F oven for about 40 minutes on the bottom shelf until set.
Makes 1 pie.
